relative_path: Documents - permits, forms, datasheets, handbooks etc./GSK_papers_2021/Not filled forms/University of Helsinki - EHS RFI.docx
full_text:
Company/Organisation Information

2. - EHS Management Questions

Shipping and Receiving 
(relevant if the Third Party will be sending material back to GSK or to another 3rd party)

3. Environmental Protection

4. Chemical or Biological questions sets

5. Hazard Specific Risks

Animal allergens – relevant in the event that GSK is supplying lab animals – N/A

Radioactive Substances – N/A

Controlled Drugs – N/A

Process Safety

Please answer all questions as completely as possible and give a brief description where applicable or needed. In the event that a question or section does not apply, please mark as `NA’ (Not Applicable). | Please answer all questions as completely as possible and give a brief description where applicable or needed. In the event that a question or section does not apply, please mark as `NA’ (Not Applicable).
Company/ Organisation Name: | University of Helsinki
Site Address: | 
Total number of staff on site: | 
Completed by: | 
Title: | 
Tel. / Email Address: | 
Date Completed: |

Risk Management and Compliance | Risk Management and Compliance
Please briefly outline the systems in place to ensure that all relevant EHS controls are identified and maintained to meet regulatory requirements | 
Is there any external verification of the EHS management system? | 
Please describe the governance mechanisms to address any issues and drive continual improvement on performance. | 
People | People
Please identify training requirements and level of experience expected for personnel engaged in GSK activities. | 
Fire Prevention & Protection | Fire Prevention & Protection
What level of fire detection and suppression control measures are in place for the areas what GSK will utilize. | 
Performance | Performance
If there have been any significant adverse events in the last 5 years (e.g. fire, serious injury/illness or environmental damage) please provide a brief description. | 
Occupational Health | Occupational Health
Outline the key aspects of the health program that covers the protection of work health when handling hazardous materials. |

Shipping/Receiving | Shipping/Receiving
Do you have a specific program that covers the receipt, shipping, handling, use, dispatch and disposal of hazardous materials? | Yes / No

Environmental Protection | Environmental Protection
What processes are in place to ensure the site complies with all relevant environmental laws / regulation / permits/ approvals? | 
Outline the due diligence process for the disposal of waste streams generated as a result of GSK related activities. | 
Outline the processes to ensure effluent created from GSK processes will not compromise on or off site effluent treatment facilities. | 
Outline the processes to ensure all significant atmospheric emission points have been identified and adequately controlled e.g. filter, absorption, scrubbing etc.? | 
Outline processes to ensure ground contamination is minimized e.g. hard surface storage areas, bund or integrity testing of underground tanks |

Chemical Hazards | Chemical Hazards
Is the laboratory accredited by a recognized accrediting body? | Yes/No
If No please explain
Please outline the risk assessment process for work with chemicals. Please make reference to how these satisfy regional regulatory requirements. | 
Please outline how risk assessments are communicated to lab personnel. | 
Please outline the written standards / documents detailing the procedures for handling chemical / hazardous materials. | 
Please describe how personnel engaged in work with chemical agents are suitably trained and experienced/supervised to undertake the work in question. | 
Describe the engineering controls (e.g. fume cupboards) available for handling hazardous materials. | 
Describe any other controls (administrative or PPE) to minimize exposure to hazardous materials. | 
Describe the occupational health arrangements in place to monitor staff that handle chemical agents. | 
Additional Question - Materials with OEL < 1µg/m3 | Additional Question - Materials with OEL < 1µg/m3
Please describe the control strategy or provide a copy of your risk assessment for handling highly potent (OEL < 1µg/m3) materials. | 
Please provide exposure data to support the ways of working identified above. |

Biological Hazard – N/A | Biological Hazard – N/A
Is the laboratory accredited by a recognized accrediting body? | Yes/No

If No please explain
Please outline the risk assessment process for work with biological agent. Please make reference to how these satisfy regional regulatory requirements. | 
Please outline how risk assessments are communicated to lab personnel. | 
Please outline the written standards / documents detailing the procedures for handling biohazards | 
Please describe how personnel engaged in work with bio-hazardous agents are suitably trained and experienced/supervised to undertake the work in question. | 
Have all personnel engaged in work with human bloodborne pathogens been offered the Hepatitis B Vaccine? | 
Please describe the engineering controls (e.g. biosafety cabinets) available for handling bio hazardous agents | 
Describe any other controls (administrative or PPE) to minimize exposure to bio hazardous agents. | 
Describe the occupational health arrangements in place to monitor staff that handle biohazardous agents. |

Animal Allergens | Animal Allergens
Please comment on your entry/gowning and animal-handling procedures | N/A
Are staff aware of care policies in their work area or responsibility? | N/A
Please comment on your occupational health program and whether it includes zoonosis awareness (based on the species within the facility) and where necessary health surveillance. | N/A
What control strategies are in place to minimize allergen exposure and spread? (e.g. Facility design, Engineering, PPE etc)? | N/A

Radioactive Substances | Radioactive Substances
Please provide a copy of the license to handle radiation or explain the regulatory framework for the region. | N/A
Please advise who provides your Radiation Protection Advice. | N/A

Controlled Drugs | Controlled Drugs
Please provide a copy of the license to keep, dispense and use controlled drugs on site. | N/A
Please advise who provides your Controlled Drugs Advice | N/A

Process Safety | Process Safety
Please outline the basis of safety that has been applied to the design of chemical plant including assessment techniques. | 
Please identify the specialist advice available for process safety (e.g. competent engineer)? | 
Please describe the arrangements in place for controlling work on site by visiting contractors? | 
Please outline controls to minimise risk from storage and transfer of flammable materials and gases. | 
Please outline the process to ensure any electrical hazards are assessed and controlled for areas handling highly flammable liquids / hazardous gases or in areas where dust is generated? | 
Please outline the permit to work systems in place. |
